findings.evidence: Basic.lean:118 `instance fullSubcategory (Z : ObjectProperty C) : Preadditive Z.FullSubcategory`; AdditiveFunctor.lean:182 `fullSubcategoryInclusion_additive`. File body contains only hom_zero/add/neg/sub and *_apply lemmas, none referencing functors or the inclusion.
findings.fix: Drop the `import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Preadditive.AdditiveFunctor` line (a heavy import). If the additive inclusion is intended as a contribution, add an actual declaration/instance that uses it; otherwise leave it to downstream importers.
findings.issue: Unused import `Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Preadditive.AdditiveFunctor`. The file declares only simp lemmas on hom-set group operations; the full-subcategory preadditive instance (`ObjectProperty.fullSubcategory`) comes from `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Preadditive/Basic.lean` (via the `...Comodule.Preadditive` import) and `.hom` from the `Finite` import chain. No declaration mentions additivity of the inclusion despite the docstring referencing `fullSubcategoryInclusion_additive`.

summary: Placement is correct, but the file imports Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Preadditive.AdditiveFunctor while none of its eight rfl simp lemmas use any additive-functor declaration; the preadditive structure and .hom projection they rely on come from Preadditive.Basic and the Finite import chain.
